content.problemStatement:
Given the integers $A$ and $C$ - how do we find their average - the integer $B$? \
Code this sub-problem in the IDE to continue.
content.inputFormat:
- The first line of input will contain a single integer $T$, denoting the number of test cases.
- Each test case consists of two space-separated integers $A$ and $C$, the given integers.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output $-1$ if there exists no integer $B$ such that $A, B,$ and $C$ are in arithmetic progression. Else, output the value of $B$.
